NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, and Tech Innovators Pte. Ltd., UEN 200512345A, with its principal office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048621.

1. Confidential Information: The parties acknowledge that during the term of this Agreement, either party may disclose to the other certain confidential and proprietary information ("Confidential Information"). Such information may include, but is not limited to, technical data, trade secrets, and business plans. Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of such information and not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party: The party receiving Confidential Information ("Receiving Party") agrees to employ all reasonable measures to protect the confidentiality of the information, ensuring that it is not disseminated beyond what is necessary for the purposes of this Agreement. The Receiving Party shall notify the disclosing party immediately upon discovery of any unauthorized use or disclosure of the Confidential Information.

Dr. Emily Tan can be contacted at +65 6123 4567 or via email at emily.tan@example.sg. Tech Innovators Pte. Ltd. may be contacted at +65 6789 0123.
